channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 2 x fast gas canisters on the pavement, 5th May
item.description:
2 x Fast gas canisters on the pavement under the hedge on the Green Lane side of 35 Albany Rd
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young Tree Needs Attention, 4th May
item.description:
Tree is leaning and needs re-staking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Euston Road, Fitzrovia, Greater London

item.title: Assorted rubbish dumped on road and footway., 4th May
item.description:
Assorted rubbish dumped on road and footway between 20:30 and 23:30.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): New Park Avenue, Southgate

item.title: Bags of builder waste, near railings, 4th May
item.description:
This waste has been there for around a year and appears to be dumped. There is also a large pile of soil further back and some bags of building material, but these have only been there for a couple of weeks so not clear if this is fly-tipping or if it will be collected at some point.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sinclair Place, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp Constantly flashing on and iff, 4th May
item.description:
Flashing on and off all night outside my bedroom window, previously reported twice and notified as fixed, which it has not been.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public lamp got damage due to the wind, 4th May
item.description:
Due to the wind the lamp has overturn and directed to my Apartment complex.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queens Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All street lights on Brooks Way are off, 4th May
item.description:
All the street lights from Brooks Way path through to Main Road are off. People cannot walk through at night as it's not lit up and not safe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair left on street, 4th May
item.description:
Chair has been dumped on the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Asaph Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kids always playing out making block look trampy, 4th May
item.description:
The block I live in

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobden Walk, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lighting, 4th May
item.description:
More lighting needs to be put on the alleyway and footpath and building so the area is better lit up. Antisocial behaviour is happening and drug users and it’s scary coming home and stumbling across them. There was a fight in the alleyway the other night and someone got robbed in the alleyway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cooper's Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Steel rod sticking out of grass, 4th May
item.description:
Steel rod sticking out of the ground in Southmere Park. About 8 inches long. Unable to pull it out. Someone has tried to flatten it. Because it is hard to find have used what3words. flesh.sums.stole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, St Edmunds Close, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lighting, 4th May
item.description:
More lighting needs to be put on the footpath and building so the area is better lit up. Antisocial behaviour is happening and drug users and it’s scary coming home and stumbling across them. There’s people sitting there on almost a daily basis taking drugs or drinking they also sit on the stairs and at the bottom of the blocks of Clare House and Stafford House
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brodie Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kids car seat dumped at the top of park, 4th May
item.description:
Kids car seat dumped at the top of park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bird poo, 4th May
item.description:
There’s bird poo along the balcony outside numbers 11, 9,8 & 7. The whole landing needs to be swept and mopped including the stairs and walk way leading to the stairs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brodie Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At least 500mmx400mm depth 50mm, 4th May
item.description:
The pot hole is slowly getting larger as the sides get eroded way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 4th May
item.description:
A dumped car outside of 75 witherston way eltham se9 3jl its mot ran out on 08.04 2025 and the tax expired on the 1st of March 2026 which is 2months since it expired.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Witherston Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
